query:
INSERT INTO courses (courseCode, courseName, description, room, lecturer, department, classSize, isActive)
VALUES
  ('COMP3161', 'Database Management Systems', 'Covers relational algebra, SQL, normalization, transactions, and NoSQL databases.', 'FST LT1', 'Dr. Gunter Rowe', 'Computing', 85, true),
  ('COMP2140', 'Software Engineering', 'Software development lifecycle, agile methods, design patterns, and testing strategies.', 'FST LT2', 'Dr. Amos Bairagi', 'Computing', 72, true),
  ('COMP3901', 'Final Year Project I', 'Independent research and development project supervised by faculty.', 'FST 301', 'Dr. Leonie Gooden', 'Computing', 40, true),
  ('PSYC2001', 'Introduction to Psychology', 'Foundations of human behaviour, cognition, emotion, and social interaction.', 'Mona Visitors Lodge', 'Dr. Carla Thompson', 'Behavioural Sciences', 120, true),
  ('SOCI2005', 'Caribbean Sociology', 'Social structures, inequality, and cultural dynamics in the Caribbean region.', 'Social Sciences LT', 'Dr. Marcus Brown', 'Sociology', 95, true),
  ('MATH2401', 'Calculus II', 'Integration techniques, sequences, series, and multivariable calculus.', 'Physics LT1', 'Dr. Natasha Reid', 'Mathematics', 110, true),
  ('ECON2010', 'Macroeconomics', 'National income, inflation, unemployment, monetary and fiscal policy.', 'Social Sciences LT2', 'Dr. Howard Clarke', 'Economics', 130, true),
  ('BIOL2201', 'Cell Biology', 'Cell structure, function, division, signalling pathways, and molecular mechanisms.', 'Life Sciences LT1', 'Dr. Simone Watson', 'Biology', 88, true),
  ('CHEM1010', 'General Chemistry I', 'Atomic structure, bonding, stoichiometry, and thermodynamics fundamentals.', 'Chemistry LT', 'Dr. Paul Levy', 'Chemistry', 145, true),
  ('COMP2201', 'Data Structures and Algorithms', 'Arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, sorting, and algorithm complexity analysis.', 'FST LT3', 'Dr. Amos Bairagi', 'Computing', 90, true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE courseName = VALUES(courseName);
